characters.name: Carol Schicklgruber
characters.description: Carol Schicklgruberis a secretary atSummerdown School. She works underLizin the School Office and is known for her fickle adoration. She shows her affection to bothKurtandPennyin this way; whilst the feelings are reciprocated with Kurt, Penny uses this to her advantage.

characters.name: Clare Hunter
characters.description: Clare Hunteris headmistress atSummerdown School, a job which she takes very seriously. She is very strict and seems to enjoy the power which is bought about by her job.
